description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push to the release branch. The workflow has two jobs: build on windows-latest and docker build and push on ubuntu-latest. The build job checks out code, sets up .NET Core SDK 9.0.x, restores NuGet packages, and builds and publishes the app. It also zips the release, creates a changelog, and uploads the release to GitHub. Additionally, it posts to a Discord webhook. The docker job builds and pushes a Docker image.
